The CFO forum
2026

Date
Wednesday 3 June 2026
Venue
Holmes Hotel, London
Format
Forum with lunch, drinks to follow
Scroll to explore
01 · About

A day for finance leaders in Bowmark-backed businesses

Who attends

Senior finance leaders

CFOs and finance directors from companies backed by Bowmark funds, joined by a small group of sector specialists and advisers.

What to expect

Working sessions, not pitches

Chatham House format. Short framings from practitioners, followed by structured discussion in small groups.

Why this year

Building the next five

Pricing, working capital, integration and talent – the themes that will define the next phase of growth across the portfolio.

04 · Speakers and sessions

Shaped by the people doing the work

11.15am

Session one

Exit case study – Totalmobile panel and Q&A

A deep-dive into the Totalmobile exit journey, covering preparation, process and lessons learned from the deal team and CFO.

Panel Exit
